MILESTONE_OBJECTIVES.OBJ_WHEN_NIPPLE_TOUCHES_MOUTH_ABLE_TO_OP: When the nipple touches his/her mouth, he/she is able to open his/her mouth.
MILESTONE_OBJECTIVES.OBJ_DURING_PLAY_WITH_CHILDREN_ABLE_TO_IN: During play with other children, he/she is able to engage in interaction at times.
MILESTONE_OBJECTIVES.OBJ_WHEN_EXPERIENCING_PROBLEM_ABLE_TO_AS: When experiencing a problem, he/she is able to ask for help.
MILESTONE_OBJECTIVES.OBJ_ABLE_TO_TURN_GAZE_TOWARD_SOUND: He/She is able to turn his/her gaze toward the source of a sound.
MILESTONE_OBJECTIVES.OBJ_WHEN_PROMPTED_ABLE_TO_INDICATE_SELF: When prompted, he/she is able to indicate himself/herself.
MILESTONE_OBJECTIVES.OBJ_ABLE_TO_FOLLOW_THREE_CONSECUTIVE_INS: He/She is able to follow three consecutive instructions.
MILESTONE_OBJECTIVES.OBJ_ABLE_TO_VOCALIZE_TO_GAIN_ATTENTION: He/She is able to vocalize in order to gain attention.
MILESTONE_OBJECTIVES.OBJ_ABLE_TOCOUNT_FROM_ONE_TO_THREE: He/She is able to count from 1 to 3.
MILESTONE_OBJECTIVES.OBJ_ABLE_TO_ASK_MEANING_OF_WORDS: He/She is able to ask about the meaning of words.
MILESTONE_OBJECTIVES.OBJ_ABLE_TO_TRANSFER_TOY_FROM_ONE_HAND_T: He/She is able to transfer a toy from one hand to the other.
MILESTONE_OBJECTIVES.OBJ_ABLE_TO_NAME_FAMILIAR_ADULTS_SHOWN_I: He/She is able to name familiar adults shown in photographs.
MILESTONE_OBJECTIVES.OBJ_ABLE_TO_PICK_UP_SPECIFIED_NUMBER_OF_: He/She is able to pick up the specified number of objects (between 1 and 5).
MILESTONE_OBJECTIVES.OBJ_WHEN_LYING_IN_PRONE_POSITION_ABLE_TO: When lying in a prone position, he/she is able to turn his/her head to the right and left.YYY
MILESTONE_OBJECTIVES.OBJ_ABLE_TO_HOLD_FILLED_GLASS_WITH_ONE_H: He/She is able to hold a filled glass with one hand.
MILESTONE_OBJECTIVES.OBJ_ABLE_TO_STAND_ON_ONE_FOOT_FOR_X_SECO: He/She is able to stand on one foot for 4–8 seconds.
MILESTONE_OBJECTIVES.OBJ_ABLE_TO_BRING_BOTH_HANDS_TOGETHER: He/She is able to bring both hands together.
MILESTONE_OBJECTIVES.OBJ_ABLE_TO_THREAD_LARGE_BEADS_ONTO_STRI: He/She is able to thread large beads onto a string.
MILESTONE_OBJECTIVES.OBJ_ABLE_TO_CREATE_TWO_THREE_PART_SHAPES: He/She is able to create two- to three-part shapes using playdough.
MILESTONE_OBJECTIVES.OBJ_ABLE_TO_CONSUME_PUREED_OR_MASHED_FOO: He/She is able to consume pureed or mashed foods.
MILESTONE_OBJECTIVES.OBJ_ABLE_TO_POUR_WATER_FROM_A_BOTTLE_INT: He/She is able to pour water from a bottle into a glass.
MILESTONE_OBJECTIVES.OBJ_ABLE_TO_WIPE_UP_SPILLED_LIQUIDS_USIN: He/She is able to wipe up spilled liquids using a cloth.
